title: Royal Decree 40/2026 Ratifying the Instrument for the Amendment of the Constitution of the International Labour Organisation 1986
text:
Arabic

We, Haitham bin Tarik, the Sultan of Oman

after perusal of the Basic Statute of the State,

Royal Decree 10/94 Approving the Accession of the Sultanate of Oman to the International Labour Organization,

and the Instrument for the Amendment of the Constitution of the International Labour Organization of 1986,

and in pursuance of public interest,

have decreed as follows

Article I

The Instrument for the Amendment of the Constitution of the International Labour Organization of 1986 is hereby ratified in the form attached.

Article II

Competent entities shall deposit the instrument of ratification of the mentioned instrument in accordance with its provisions.

Article III

This decree must be published in the Official Gazette, and comes into force on the date of its issuance.

Issued on: 11 Ramadan 1447Corresponding to: 1 March 2026

Haitham bin TarikSultan of Oman

Published in Official Gazette 1638 issued on 8 March 2026.
